arts.ttl: NBA legend Steve Nash: “I support Mallorca and Spurs, not Madrid or Barça”
arts.sum: Before joining Brooklyn Nets as head coach in 2020, in 2016 the 50-year-old decided to embark on a business venture in a different sporting world joining former Phoenix Suns owner Robert Sarver in becoming a shareholder in Spanish soccer club Real Mallorca. It is a great achievement to be able to play at the Super Cup and the players have earned it with their hard work last season.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham ranked the most valuable player in the world
arts.sum: In a world where Rodri is the Ballon d’Or winner and Vinicius FIFA’s The Best, Jude Bellingham is the most valuable player in the world - at least according to the ranking published this Wednesday by the International Centre for Sports Studies (CIES). The Real Madrid midfielder is valued at 251 million euros ($258.58 million), while Manchester City striker Erling Haaland, his closest rival, is valued at 221 million ($227.6 million).

arts.ttl: Real Madrid lose top midfielder to injury hours before Spanish Supercup clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid have not long been into 2025, but their first injury issue has struck after two games. While David Alaba has returned to the squad for their trip to Saudi Arabia in the Spanish Supercup, Luka Modric will not be available for their semi-final clash on Thursday night against RCD Mallorca. Los Blancos made […] The post Real Madrid lose top midfielder to injury hours before Spanish Supercup clash appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Vinicius red card is a chance for Real Madrid to calm vitriol, not spike it
arts.sum: Vinicius' sending-off vs. Valencia was a fairly unremarkable moment -- and just his second career red card -- but the manner in which it was covered must be scrutinized.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos 'secure deal' for highly-rated teenage centre-back
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly officially complete the signing of 18-year-old centre-back Lamini Fati from Leganes.

arts.ttl: Mallorca’s Cyle Larin: ‘Some players dive with the pressure but I like it’
arts.sum: Club’s top scorer has his sights set on the Spanish Super Cup but harbours ambitions of playing in the Premier League “Pair of extra socks, pair of extra boxers”, and that, Cyle Larin says, is pretty much that. Well, it is normally. This time, it is a little different. There is a smile and Real Mallorca’s top scorer this season, Canada’s top scorer of all time, says: “Win that first game and you got to stay longer.” More boxers, more socks, maybe more history too. Win that first game, Thursday night’s Spanish Super Cup semi-final, and they will still be there on Sunday night, 5,000km from home and 90 minutes from the third trophy in their 108 years. arts.ttl: Official: Real Madrid sign Lamini Fati
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have on Wednesday secured defensive reinforcements for the club’s academy ranks. The player to have put pen to paper on terms with the Spanish champions?…
